falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decrease in blowoff score indicates reduced volatility/momentum pressure, contradicting the HOLD signal's implication of continued consolidation.
A clear breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the pattern's bearish implications and suggest a reversal in trend.
This would indicate overbought conditions and momentum shift, directly contradicting the HOLD signal's expectation of continued sideways consolidation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
